title: Equity-inclusive risk-engine roadmap (deferred techniques, sequenced)
source: quant-phd-advisor re-review (2026-05-30) under the long-horizon + future-equity frame, verified against a reproduced full-history backtest (scripts/backtest_survival_book.py, 2000-01-03 -> 2026-05-29, 26.4y).
why: Several techniques are 'theater' on today's 8-asset, equity-free, N=8 spot book but GRADUATE to genuinely valuable once equity/equity-index exposure is added (larger N, real cluster structure, the leverage-effect Sharpe channel). Captured here so they are not lost and are sequenced correctly. Sequence: (1) Harvey vol-targeting Sharpe channel activates FOR FREE on an equity sleeve (leverage effect gives vol-targeting a RETURN benefit it cannot earn on FX/metals/crypto); already implemented, just starts paying. (2) Factor/structured risk model (Barra-style / Fama-French-anchored) once a cross-section of equity exposures exists (a single index does not justify it). (3) Nonlinear Ledoit-Wolf shrinkage (2017) turns ON as N grows (p/n rises); at today's N=8 with a years-long window n>>p so linear shrinkage ~= sample matrix -- DEFERRED, not adopted now. (4) HRP/clustering as a DSR/CPCV-GATED CANDIDATE at N>=15-20 (replication evidence is split; HRP underperforms inverse-vol in the correlated-group case, so it must beat inverse-vol, not be adopted on faith). (5) Non-directional premia via equity-index futures (roll/carry/dividend futures) re-open the frontier that is structurally closed to a spot-only book -- same instrument-access gate as crypto perps (B0100).
value_rationale: M: high future value but entirely gated on the equity-universe expansion and instrument access; nothing actionable until then.
scope: Activate/verify Harvey Sharpe channel on the equity sleeve when added.
Factor risk model at moderate equity N.
HRP/clustering as a DSR/CPCV-gated candidate vs inverse-vol (never faith-based).
recommendation: Do NOT start until equity is in the universe. The Harvey vol-targeting Sharpe channel is itself DSR/PBO-gated on the equity sleeve (NOT auto-credited as validated alpha). Keep DCC-GARCH out indefinitely. NOTE: retiring the hackathon-window tournament tilt and any change to the LIVE lottery sleeve's status must be its OWN tracked B-ID, not a clause here.
out_of_scope: Any spot-only harvesting of premia that need futures/perps.

history.reason: risk-officer: Harvey DSR-gated; live-sleeve retirement needs its own B-ID
